title: Ralph-loop 2.0? The real autonomous coder is coming...
summary: AI Jason discusses the /goal feature and goal-buddy functionality in what appears to be an agentic coding framework. The video covers setup, prompting practices, and mission exploration for longer horizontal coding tasks, positioning these as steps toward true autonomous coding.
